title: Backports for v5.6.1
body:
Couple backports, release notes updates, plus a vendor of xz v0.5.15 to fix a potential CVE

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body:
LGTM
assuming happy tests.
I'm a little concerned about having a 5.6.1 in Fedora, as it will be different from the one in RHEL, unless we do more backports.  We don't currently have ZeroDay cards for them.
We won't tag in RHEL land, just Fedora. RHEL is 5.6.0 + many patches.
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
